narrative:
Madison Twp township has 7,002 registered voters, with 61.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.6%, a clear Republican lean of 11.6 percentage points.
